sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44240" key="eu)/khlos2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὔκηλος</orth> (B), <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">καίω</etym>) <sense id="n44240.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">easily burning</tr_>, or (cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εὐκέατος</foreign>) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">easily split</tr_>, Ion Trag. 28.</sense> </entryFree>
